name: Shubham Kumar
title: Senior Data Scientist at Cogitate
summary: Shubham Kumar is a mid-level Data Scientist with strong generative AI and NLP experience but limited exposure to enterprise-scale AI governance and productization. His technical depth is solid, yet his risk posture is high due to rapid automation of model development and deployment workflows.
score_rationale: Profile shows consistent growth and relevant AI skills but lacks demonstrated leadership in AI strategy or cross-domain product ownership.

ai_risk_assessment.summary: Automation of data science workflows and low-code AI platforms will compress mid-level data science roles by 2026. Shubham’s current focus on model building and deployment is directly exposed to generative automation tools.
ai_risk_assessment.recommendation: Shift immediately toward AI product management and MLOps architecture to secure long-term relevance.
risk_drivers: Rise of AutoML and GenAI code generation
Limited exposure to AI governance and product lifecycle

strengths: Strong NLP and OCR pipeline experience
Cross-domain exposure in Fintech and Healthcare
gaps: No evidence of scalable MLOps or governance expertise
insights.market_position: Competitive technically but vulnerable to automation-driven role compression

recommendations.action: Enroll in an advanced MLOps and AI governance certification
recommendations.reason: Build resilience against automation and align with enterprise AI deployment standards

recommendations.action: Lead a cross-functional AI product initiative within current organization
recommendations.reason: Demonstrate product ownership and strategic AI integration capability

recommendations.action: Publish technical case studies or open-source contributions on scalable GenAI systems
recommendations.reason: Strengthen visibility and credibility in future-proof AI domains

job_recommendations.reason: Leverages technical AI depth while transitioning toward strategic product leadership, reducing automation exposure.
next_steps: Gain experience in cross-functional AI delivery

upskilling_plan.why: Critical to move beyond model development into scalable, compliant AI systems management
learning_actions: Implement CI/CD pipeline for GenAI models

day_0_30: Audit current AI deployment workflows for automation exposure
day_31_60: Initiate internal AI product ownership project
day_61_90: Apply for hybrid AI strategy roles

Cross-domain exposure in Fintech and Healthcare
